mapper.select: select mar_goods.goods_name,mar_goods.id goods_id, mar_suggest.content,mar_suggest.release_time from mar_suggest left join mar_submit on mar_submit.goods_id=mar_suggest.goods_id left join mar_goods on mar_goods.id=mar_suggest.goods_id where mar_goods.goods_status=-1 and mar_submit.user_id=#{userId};
